title:
Lesson 1:
I Can't Hear You / There's Noise
description: 'No escuché' = I didn't hear (past). 'No te escucho' = I can't hear you (present, ongoing). 'Hay mucho ruido' = There's a lot of noise. 'Escuché un ruido' = I heard a noise.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Can you repeat? I can't hear you well.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Hay mucho ruido aquí. ¿Puedo llamarte después?
dialogue.english: There's a lot of noise here. Can I call you later?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Yes. Hey, did you hear that noise earlier?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I didn't hear anything. What was it?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Escuché un ruido afuera. No sé qué fue.
dialogue.english: I heard a noise outside. I don't know what it was.
